%
% LMTX-compatible version of tuftish-fonts.tex
% Font names updated to match LMTX's normalization
%
% WRT Garamond Premier Pro:
%  Caption:   from 5.9 to 8.9 points
%  Body Text: from 8.9 to 14.9 points (designed @ 11pt)
%  Subhead:   from 14.9 to 22.9 points
%  Display:   from 22.9 to 72.0 points
%

\enabledirectives[fonts.injections.fontkern]

\setupfontexpansion[aphz][stretch=4,shrink=4,step=.2,vector=default,factor=1.0]
\definefontfeature[default][liga=yes,kern=yes,tlig=yes,trep=no]
\definefontfeature[tuftish-norm][default]
 [mode=node, protrusion=quality, extension=quality, expansion=aphz,
  compose=yes, analyze=yes, autolanguage=position, autoscript=position,
  checkmarks=yes, curs=yes, extensions=yes, extrafeatures=yes, script=dflt,
  spacekern=yes, kern=yes, size=yes,
  mark=yes, mkmk=yes,
  char-ligatures=yes, missing=yes, case=yes,
  tlig=yes, liga=yes, rlig=yes, clig=yes, trep=no,
  itlc=yes, textitalics=yes]

\definefontfeature[swashy][default][swsh=yes,cswh=yes]
\definefontfeature[super-swashy][default][swsh=yes,cswh=no]

\definefontfeature [f:liningstyle] [onum=no,lnum=yes]
\definefontfeature [f:oldstyle][default][onum=yes]

\definefontfeature [gpp-norm]   [tuftish-norm] [protrusion=quality,extension=quality,pnum=yes,tnum=no,onum=yes,lnum=no,locl=yes,zero=yes,trep=no,mode=node]
\definefontfeature [gpp-norm-reg][gpp-norm]    [salt=yes,trep=no,mode=node]
\definefontfeature [gpp-it]     [gpp-norm]     [protrusion=quality,extension=quality,clig=yes,calt=yes]
\definefontfeature [gpp-sc]     [gpp-norm-reg] [protrusion=quality,extension=quality,smcp=yes,hist=yes,dlig=yes,calt=yes,clig=yes,onum=no,lnum=yes]
\definefontfeature [gpp-ac]     [gpp-norm]     [protrusion=quality,extension=quality,case=yes,dlig=yes,cpsp=yes,calt=yes,salt=yes,clig=yes,onum=no,titl=yes,lnum=yes,pnum=yes]
\definefontfeature [gpp-title]  [gpp-norm]     [protrusion=quality,extension=quality,case=yes,dlig=yes,cpsp=yes,calt=yes,salt=yes,clig=yes,onum=yes,titl=yes,lnum=no,pnum=yes]
\definefontfeature [gpp-titlish][tuftish-norm] [case=yes,dlig=yes,calt=yes,salt=yes,clig=yes,onum=yes,titl=yes,lnum=no,pnum=yes,smcp=yes]
\definefontfeature [roboto-norm][tuftish-norm] [protrusion=quality,extension=quality,pnum=yes,tnum=no,onum=yes,lnum=no]
\definefontfeature [roboto-title][roboto-norm] [protrusion=quality,extension=quality,pnum=yes,tnum=no,onum=no,lnum=yes,titl=yes]
\definefontfeature [roboto-sc]  [roboto-norm]  [protrusion=quality,extension=quality,smcp=yes,case=yes,cpsp=yes,titl=yes]
\definefontfeature [roboto-ac]  [roboto-norm]  [protrusion=quality,extension=quality,case=yes,hist=yes,dlig=yes,calt=yes,clig=yes,cpsp=yes,titl=yes]
\definefontfeature [fira-norm]  []
[mode=node,protrusion=quality,extension=quality,locl=no,clig=yes,calt=yes,zero=no,mark=yes,mkmk=yes,kern=yes,size=yes,liga=yes,rlig=yes,clig=yes,trep=yes,tlig=yes]

\definefontfeature[normkern][kern=yes]
\definefontfeature[ackern][kern=yes,letterspace=0.8]
\definefontfeature[actight][kern=yes,letterspace=0.8]
\definefontfeature[emacsp][effect={width=1.5}]

% Font fallbacks for missing glyphs
\definefontfallback [rmfb] [file:FreeSerif.otf] [0x00000-0xFFFFF] [check=yes,force=no,rscale=auto]
\definefontfallback [ssfb] [file:DejaVuSans.ttf] [0x00000-0xFFFFF] [check=yes,force=no,rscale=auto]
\definefontfallback [ttfb] [file:DejaVuSansMono.ttf] [0x00000-0xFFFFF] [check=yes,force=no,rscale=auto]

% Font alternatives
\definefontalternative[md]   % medium
\definefontalternative[mi]   % medium italic
\definefontalternative[MD]   % semibold
\definefontalternative[MI]   % semibold italic
\definefontalternative[ms]   % medium smallcap
\definefontalternative[MS]   % semibold smallcap
\definefontalternative[AC]   % allcaps

\definecolor[darkred][r=0.62,g=0.10,b=0.13]  % RAL3003: Ruby Red

% Character kerning (matching original settings)
\setupcharacterkerning[normkern][factor=-0.045]  % Slightly tighter than normal
\setupcharacterkerning[tightkern][factor=-0.08]  % Tighter kerning for small caps
\setupcharacterkerning[ackern][factor=0.06]      % Slightly wider for all-caps
\setupcharacterkerning[actight][factor=-0.08]    % Same as tightkern

% Alternative/Body text
\definealternativestyle[embold][\em\bf][]
\definealternativestyle[boldish][\boldish][]
\definealternativestyle[emish][\emish][]
\definealternativestyle[sc][{\setcharacterkerning[actight]\sc}][{\setcharacterkerning[actight]\sc}]
\definealternativestyle[ac][{\setcharacterkerning[ackern]\setcharactercasing[WORD]}][{\setcharacterkerning[ackern]\setcharactercasing[WORD]}]
\definealternativestyle[slish][\slish][]
\definealternativestyle[ssslanted][\ss\sl][]
\definealternativestyle[mono][\tt][]
\definealternativestyle[veryverylight][{\transparent[.15]}][{\transparent[.15]}]
\definealternativestyle[verylight][{\transparent[.30]}][{\transparent[.30]}]
\definealternativestyle[light][{\transparent[.45]}][{\transparent[.45]}]

% Body and caption font switching
\def\CaptionBody{captionface,rm,8pt}
\def\TextCaption{\switchtobodyfont[\CaptionBody]}
\def\TextNormal{\switchtobodyfont[tuftish,rm,11pt]}

% Custom font definitions
\definefont [ChapterLetterFont]  [file:Roboto-Thin.ttf*roboto-title at 22pt]
\definefont [ChapterFont]        [file:Roboto-Thin.ttf*roboto-norm at 32pt]
\definefont [LettrineFont]       [file:garamondpremrpro-ltdisp*gpp-norm at 48pt]
\definefont [SectionNumberFont]  [file:garamondpremrpro*f:oldstyle at 14pt]
\definefont [TitleFont]          [file:garamondpremrpro-ltdisp*gpp-title at 36pt]
\definefont [SubSubTitleFont]    [file:Roboto-Thin.ttf*roboto-ac at 14pt]
\definefont [EpigraphFont]       [file:Roboto-Thin.ttf*roboto-ac at 14pt]
\definefont [EpigraphAuthorFont] [file:Roboto-ThinItalic.ttf*roboto-norm at 16pt]
\definefont [TextCaption]        [SerifMargin at 8.5pt]
\definefont [CaptionBody]        [SerifMargin at 8.5pt]

% Font synonyms for consistent naming
\definefontsynonym[ChapterBelowTitleFont][SerifMedium]

\starttypescriptcollection[tuftish]
  \starttypescript[serif,sans,mono][tuftish]
    % LMTX-compatible font references (no hyphens in names)
    \definefontsynonym [Serif]               [file:GaramondPremrProAlt]     [features=gpp-norm-reg,fallbacks=rmfb]
    \definefontsynonym [SerifItalic]         [file:garamondpremrpro-it]     [features=gpp-it,fallbacks=rmfb]
    \definefontsynonym [SerifMedium]         [file:garamondpremrpro-med]    [features=gpp-norm,fallbacks=rmfb]
    \definefontsynonym [SerifMediumItalic]   [file:garamondpremrpro-medit]  [features=gpp-it,fallbacks=rmfb]
    \definefontsynonym [SerifSemiBold]       [file:garamondpremrpro-smbd]   [features=gpp-norm,fallbacks=rmfb]
    \definefontsynonym [SerifSemiBoldItalic] [file:garamondpremrpro-smbdit] [features=gpp-it,fallbacks=rmfb]
    \definefontsynonym [SerifBold]           [file:garamondpremrpro-bd]     [features=gpp-norm,fallbacks=rmfb]
    \definefontsynonym [SerifBoldItalic]     [file:garamondpremrpro-bdit]   [features=gpp-it,fallbacks=rmfb]
    \definefontsynonym [SerifCaps]           [file:GaramondPremrProAlt]     [features=gpp-sc,fallbacks=rmfb]
    \definefontsynonym [SerifAllCaps]        [file:GaramondPremrProAlt]     [features=gpp-ac,fallbacks=rmfb]
    \definefontsynonym [SerifBoldCaps]       [file:garamondpremrpro-bd]     [features=gpp-sc,fallbacks=rmfb]
    \definefontsynonym [SerifBoldAllCaps]    [file:garamondpremrpro-bd]     [features=gpp-ac,fallbacks=rmfb]
    \definefontsynonym [SerifSemiBoldCaps]   [file:garamondpremrpro-smbd]   [features=gpp-sc,fallbacks=rmfb]
    \definefontsynonym [SerifMediumCaps]     [file:garamondpremrpro-med]    [features=gpp-sc,fallbacks=rmfb]
    
    \definefontsynonym [Sans]           [file:Roboto-Regular]    [features=roboto-norm,fallbacks=ssfb]
    \definefontsynonym [SansItalic]     [file:Roboto-Italic]     [features=roboto-norm,fallbacks=ssfb]
    \definefontsynonym [SansBold]       [file:Roboto-Bold]       [features=roboto-norm,fallbacks=ssfb]
    \definefontsynonym [SansBoldItalic] [file:Roboto-BoldItalic] [features=roboto-norm,fallbacks=ssfb]
    \definefontsynonym [SansCaps]       [file:Roboto-Regular]    [features=roboto-sc,fallbacks=ssfb]
    \definefontsynonym [SansAllCaps]    [file:Roboto-Regular]    [features=roboto-ac,fallbacks=ssfb]
    
    \definefontsynonym [Mono]           [file:FiraCode-Regular]  [features=fira-norm,fallbacks=ttfb]
    \definefontsynonym [MonoBold]       [file:FiraCode-Bold]     [features=fira-norm,fallbacks=ttfb]
    
    % Margin fonts
    \definefontsynonym [SerifMargin]       [file:garamondpremrpro-capt]    [features=gpp-norm,fallbacks=rmfb]
    \definefontsynonym [SerifMarginItalic] [file:garamondpremrpro-itcapt]  [features=gpp-it,fallbacks=rmfb]
    \definefontsynonym [SerifMarginBold]   [file:garamondpremrpro-bdcapt]  [features=gpp-norm,fallbacks=rmfb]
  \stoptypescript

  \starttypescript [serif] [tuftish]
    \setups[font:fallback:serif]
  \stoptypescript
  \starttypescript [sans] [tuftish]
    \setups[font:fallback:sans]
  \stoptypescript
  \starttypescript [mono] [tuftish]
    \setups[font:fallback:mono]
  \stoptypescript
  \starttypescript [tuftish]
    \definetypeface[tuftish][rm][serif][tuftish][default]
    \definetypeface[tuftish][ss][sans][tuftish][default]
    \definetypeface[tuftish][tt][mono][tuftish][default]
  \stoptypescript
\stoptypescriptcollection

% Math fonts (fallback to Latin Modern)
\definetypeface[tuftish][mm][math][modern][default]

% Define font alternatives (matching original)
\define\ac{\setcharacterkerning[ackern]\setcharactercasing[WORD]\AC}
\define\sctight{\sc\setcharacterkerning[tightkern]}
\define\boldish{\rm\ms\setcharacterkerning[normkern]}
\define\emish{\it}
\define\slish{\sl}
\define\strongish{\boldish}
\def\uppercaseish#1{{\ac #1}}

% Fallback font collections
\definefallbackfamily [mainface][rm][]
[check=yes,force=no,range=arabicpresentationformsa]

\definefallbackfamily [mainface][rm][]
[check=yes,force=no,range=arabicpresentationformsb]

\definefallbackfamily [mainface][rm][]
[check=yes,force=no,range=arabicsupplement]

\definefallbackfamily [mainface] [rm] [minionpro]
[range={0x01F00-0x01FFF}, check=yes, force=no,rscale=0.85]

\definefallbackfamily[mainface][rm][code2000]
[range={0x03000-0x04000,0x0A000-0x0CFFF,0x0F900-0x0F95F},check=yes,force=no,rscale=0.85]

\definefallbackfamily [mainface] [rm] [gentiumplus]
[check=yes, force=no, range={greekandcoptic, greekextended},rscale=auto]

\definefallbackfamily [mainface] [rm] [lucidabrightmathot]
[check=yes,force=no,range={0x00300-0x003FF,0x02100-0x02200,0x02900-0x02AFF},rscale=auto]

\definefallbackfamily [mainface] [rm] [stixgeneral]
[check=yes,force=no,range={0x01D00-0x01DFF,0x01F00-0x02000,0x02980-0x02AFF,0x1D400-0x1D7FF},rscale=auto]

\definefallbackfamily [mainface] [rm] [sileot]
[check=yes,force=no,range={0x02190-0x02200},rscale=auto]

\definefallbackfamily [mainface] [rm] [tg-adventor]
[check=yes,force=no,range={0x00600-0x00700},rscale=auto]

% Caption face for margin notes
\definefontfamily[captionface][rm][garamondpremierpro]
  [tf=file:garamondpremrprocapt*gpp-norm,
   sl=file:garamondpremrproitcapt*gpp-it,
   it=file:garamondpremrproitcapt*gpp-it,
   bf=file:garamondpremrprobdcapt*gpp-norm,
   bs=file:garamondpremrprobditcapt*gpp-it,
   bi=file:garamondpremrprobditcapt*gpp-it]
